nodes.name: Red-rumped cacique
nodes.summary: Red-rumped cacique（Red-rumped cacique，学名 Cacicus haemorrhous），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于法屬圭亞那，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 法屬圭亞那
nodes.summary: 法屬圭亞那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括红脚穴䳍、锈栗穴䳍、角叫鴨等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is also found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela. The red-rumped cacique's natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical swamps, and heavily degraded former forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is also found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela. The red-rumped cacique's natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical swamps, and heavily degraded former forest
